message.source: Control which modules are preloaded at startup. Disable to speed up launch. Changes take effect after restart.
message.translation: Control which modules are preloaded at startup. Disable to speed up launch. Changes take effect after restart.

message.source: Pre-scan system font list on startup
message.translation: Pre-scan system font list on startup

message.source: Pre-load mss, canvas, tools in background thread
message.translation: Pre-load mss, canvas, tools in background thread

message.source: Pre-create toolbar widgets to avoid first-capture lag
message.translation: Pre-create toolbar widgets to avoid first-capture lag

message.source: Pre-load OCR model in background thread
message.translation: Pre-load OCR model in background thread

message.source: Pre-create the settings dialog on startup
message.translation: Pre-create the settings dialog on startup

message.source: Control the behavior of the selection info panel during screenshot.
message.translation: Control the behavior of the selection info panel during screenshot.

message.source: Hide the info panel while dragging the selection area
message.translation: Hide the info panel while dragging the selection area

message.source: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?
message.translation: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?

message.source: Some in-app shortcuts conflict within the same group. Please fix them first.
message.translation: Some in-app shortcuts conflict within the same group. Please fix them first.

message.source: "%1" is already used by "%2". Replace it?
message.translation: "%1" is already used by "%2". Replace it?

message.source: 💡 Hint: Click the input box and press the desired key combination.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: Click the input box and press the desired key combination.

message.source: 💡 Hint: You can use modifier keys like Ctrl, Shift, Alt.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: You can use modifier keys like Ctrl, Shift, Alt.

message.source: Automatically recognizes UI elements at mouse cursor position.
message.translation: Automatically recognizes UI elements at mouse cursor position.

message.source: 1. Move cursor over window during capture
message.translation: 1. Move cursor over window during capture

message.source: 2. Area will be highlighted with blue border automatically
message.translation: 2. Area will be highlighted with blue border automatically

message.source: Automatically saves as file when capturing.
message.translation: Automatically saves as file when capturing.

message.source: Compression quality (1-100). Only affects JPG and WebP.
message.translation: Compression quality (1-100). Only affects JPG and WebP.

message.source: 💡 Hint: Even with auto-save off, it will be copied to clipboard.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: Even with auto-save off, it will be copied to clipboard.

message.source: No OCR Version / OCR module not found
message.translation: No OCR Version / OCR module not found

message.source: This is a casual version without OCR.
message.translation: This is a casual version without OCR.

message.source: If you need OCR features, please download the full version,
message.translation: If you need OCR features, please download the full version,

message.source: Enables text recognition and selection in pinned windows.
message.translation: Enables text recognition and selection in pinned windows.

message.source: Auto language detection: Supports Chinese, Japanese, English mixed recognition
message.translation: Auto language detection: Supports Chinese, Japanese, English mixed recognition

message.source: 💡 Supports 100+ languages: Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, etc.
message.translation: 💡 Supports 100+ languages: Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, etc.

message.source: Saves app activity logs to file.
message.translation: Saves app activity logs to file.

message.source: Current Log: (Not generated) *Log will be created after app starts
message.translation: Current Log: (Not generated) *Log will be created after app starts

message.source: No log files yet. Please start and use the app first.
message.translation: No log files yet. Please start and use the app first.

message.source: *Changes will fully take effect after restart.
message.translation: *Changes will fully take effect after restart.

message.source: Register in Windows startup via registry.
message.translation: Register in Windows startup via registry.

message.source: On: Shows toolbar when mouse enters pinned window.
message.translation: On: Shows toolbar when mouse enters pinned window.

message.source: Off: Show via right-click toolbar button.
message.translation: Off: Show via right-click toolbar button.

message.source: Select display language. Restart required after change.
message.translation: Select display language. Restart required after change.

message.source: 💡 Hint: Even with background startup, you can operate from system tray.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: Even with background startup, you can operate from system tray.

message.source: High-performance screenshot tool developed based on PyQt6 framework.
message.translation: High-performance screenshot tool developed based on PyQt6 framework.

message.source: Rich editing features, OCR text recognition, long screenshot, pin window,
message.translation: Rich editing features, OCR text recognition, long screenshot, pin window,

message.source: Please select a valid capture area first.
message.translation: Please select a valid capture area first.

message.source: Failed to capture the selected area.
message.translation: Failed to capture the selected area.

message.source: Please configure DeepL API key in Settings.
message.translation: Please configure DeepL API key in Settings.

message.source: Please configure DeepL API key in Settings.
message.translation: Please configure DeepL API key in Settings.

message.source: Pen tool (hold Shift for straight line)
message.translation: Pen tool (hold Shift for straight line)

message.source: Scroll slowly from top to bottom
message.translation: Scroll slowly from top to bottom

message.source: Translate the result back to original language
message.translation: Translate the result back to original language

message.source: Get your API key from DeepL website (free tier available)
message.translation: Get your API key from DeepL website (free tier available)

message.source: Enable if you have a paid DeepL subscription
message.translation: Enable if you have a paid DeepL subscription

message.source: Leave empty to follow system language
message.translation: Leave empty to follow system language

message.source: Automatically split text into sentences for better translation
message.translation: Automatically split text into sentences for better translation

message.source: Keep original text formatting in translation
message.translation: Keep original text formatting in translation

message.source: DeepL free tier: 500,000 chars/month. Get API key at
message.translation: DeepL free tier: 500,000 chars/month. Get API key at

message.source: DeepL offers a free API tier with 500,000 characters/month.
message.translation: DeepL offers a free API tier with 500,000 characters/month.

message.source: Visit https://www.deepl.com/pro-api to get your API key.
message.translation: Visit https://www.deepl.com/pro-api to get your API key.

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

message.source: All items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: All items in the group will also be deleted.

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.

message.source: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history?\nThis action cannot be undone.
message.translation: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history?\nThis action cannot be undone.

message.source: Please select a group above, or create a group first
message.translation: Please select a group above, or create a group first

message.source: A group with this name already exists
message.translation: A group with this name already exists

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

message.source: All items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: All items in the group will also be deleted.

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

message.source: Export all saved content to CSV file
message.translation: Export all saved content to CSV file

message.source: Import content from CSV file (Group, Content, Title)
message.translation: Import content from CSV file (Group, Content, Title)

message.source: No valid data found in CSV file.
message.translation: No valid data found in CSV file.

message.source: Automatically send Ctrl+V after selecting an item
message.translation: Automatically send Ctrl+V after selecting an item

message.source: Maximum number of items to keep (0 = unlimited)
message.translation: Maximum number of items to keep (0 = unlimited)

message.source: Automatically remove items exceeding the limit
message.translation: Automatically remove items exceeding the limit

message.source: If PNG is available, skip storing DIB to save space
message.translation: If PNG is available, skip storing DIB to save space

message.source: 💡 Hint: Set clipboard hotkey in Shortcuts settings.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: Set clipboard hotkey in Shortcuts settings.

message.source: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history?\nThis action cannot be undone.
message.translation: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history?\nThis action cannot be undone.

message.source: Also delete saved content in groups
message.translation: Also delete saved content in groups

message.source: Press C to copy color info
message.translation: Press C to copy color info

message.source: Used when copying color info in magnifier.
message.translation: Used when copying color info in magnifier.

message.source: 一款轻巧的屏幕截图与剪贴板管理工具， 由rijyaaru用 Python + PySide6 打造。 先选好语言，再开始探索吧！
message.translation: A lightweight screenshot & clipboard tool, crafted by rijyaaru with Python + PySide6. Pick your language and let's get started!

message.source: 选择后立即生效，欢迎界面将随之切换语言。

message.translation: Draw freely; hold Shift for straight lines
Draw arrows with multiple style options
Draw a rectangle, with optional fill
Draw an ellipse, with optional fill
Add text annotations on the screenshot
Record the screen area as an animated GIF
Float the screenshot as always-on-top overlay
Save screenshot to a local file
Copy to clipboard or save to file

message.source: 设置快捷键与截图的默认保存位置。
message.translation: Set your hotkey and default save folder for screenshots.

message.source: 单击输入框后，直接按下目标组合键即可录入。
message.translation: Click the input, then press your desired key combo.

message.source: 确认截图后自动保存到该文件夹。
message.translation: Screenshots will be auto-saved here after confirmation.

message.source: 请选择工具栏布局首选项
自动记录每一次复制，随时召唤历史内容。 支持文本、图片、文件，还能分组管理。
message.translation: Auto-records every copy. Recall any history. Supports text, images, files and groups.

message.source: 关闭后不会记录复制内容，快捷键也不会激活窗口。
message.translation: Disabled: no history saved, hotkey inactive.

message.source: 程序还会尝试注册 Win+V 作为额外备用。
message.translation: App will also try to register Win+V as extra backup.

message.source: 截图时将鼠标悬停在任意窗口上，自动识别并高亮其边界。 单击即可精准截取该窗口；也可以像平时一样拖拽框选任意区域。
message.translation: Hover over any window during screenshot mode to auto-detect and highlight its boundary. Click to capture it instantly, or drag to select any area as usual.

message.source: 开启：悬停自动高亮窗口，单击即完成截取。 关闭：恢复手动拖拽框选模式。
message.translation: On: hover to highlight a window, click to capture it. Off: use manual drag-to-select mode.

message.source: 使用 DeepL API 进行高质量翻译。 免费账户每月 50 万字符额度，够日常使用。
message.translation: High-quality translation via DeepL API. Free tier: 500K characters/month.

message.source: 留空则使用免费公共接口
message.translation: Leave empty to use the free public endpoint

message.source: 你已完成基础设置，截图工具已准备好为你服务。 随时可以在设置面板调整更多选项。
message.translation: Basic setup complete. Your screenshot tool is ready! You can tweak more options in Settings anytime.

message.source: 按下截图热键开始第一次截图
message.translation: Press the screenshot hotkey for your first capture

message.source: 复制内容后打开剪贴板历史
message.translation: Copy something, then open clipboard history

message.source: 右键托盘图标访问设置
message.translation: Right-click the tray icon to open Settings

message.source: 开机后在检测更新后启动。
message.translation: Checks for updates then starts silently in the background.

message.source: 每次启动时自动打开设置面板。
message.translation: Automatically opens the settings panel on every launch.

message.source: 完成向导时在桌面创建截图吧快捷方式。
message.translation: Creates a Jietuba shortcut on your desktop when the wizard finishes.

message.source: 截图 · 标注 · 剪贴板 · 翻译，一站搞定
Affects selection border, toolbar border, magnifier crosshair, etc. Restart recommended after change.
message.translation: Affects selection border, toolbar border, magnifier crosshair, etc. Restart recommended after change.

message.source: Used for selection border, toolbar accent, magnifier crosshair.
message.translation: Used for selection border, toolbar accent, magnifier crosshair.

message.source: The semi-transparent overlay color outside the selection area during screenshot.
message.translation: The semi-transparent overlay color outside the selection area during screenshot.

message.source: The overlay color for unselected area. Supports transparency.
message.translation: The overlay color for unselected area. Supports transparency.

message.source: 💡 Hint: Color changes take effect on the next screenshot.
message.translation: 💡 Hint: Color changes take effect on the next screenshot.

message.source: OCR text recognition · Long screenshot · Pin window · Clipboard manager · DeepL translation
message.translation: OCR text recognition · Long screenshot · Pin window · Clipboard manager · DeepL translation

message.source: Merge multi-line text for better translation
message.translation: Merge multi-line text for better translation

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

message.source: All items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: All items in the group will also be deleted.

message.source: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.
message.translation: Are you sure you want to delete this group?\nAll items in the group will also be deleted.
